welcome.usernameNotSet:
Hi {{user}}, welcome to .fmbot.
To use this bot you first need to add your Last.fm account.

Use the buttons below to sign up or connect your existing Last.fm account.
login.alreadyConnected:
You have already connected a Last.fm account. To change the account you've connected to .fmbot, use the buttons below.

Using Spotify and having problems with your music not being tracked or it lagging behind? Re-logging in again will not fix this, please use `{{command}}` for help instead.
login.welcome:
Welcome to .fmbot. To use .fmbot, a Last.fm account is required.

Use the buttons below to sign up or connect your existing Last.fm account.
login.start: Use the button below to add your Last.fm account to .fmbot.
login.linkExpiry: This link will expire in 6 minutes, please wait a moment after allowing access...
login.reconnect: You have already connected a Last.fm account to the bot. If you want to change or reconnect your connected Last.fm account, **[click here.]({{url}})** Note that this link will expire after 6 minutes. Also use this link if the bot says you have to re-login.
login.spotifyOutOfSync: Using Spotify and having problems with your music not being tracked or it lagging behind? Re-logging in again will not fix this, please use `{{command}}` for help instead.
login.success: ✅ You have been logged in to .fmbot with the username [{{username}}]({{url}})!
login.settingsIntro: Use the button below to start configuring your settings and to customize your .fmbot experience.
login.notAffiliated: Please note that .fmbot is not affiliated with Last.fm.
login.failed:
Login expired or failed. Use the button below to try again.

Still having trouble connecting your Last.fm to .fmbot? Feel free to ask for help on our support server.
login.tooManyAccounts: Can't login, this Last.fm is connected to too many Discord accounts already ({{altCount}}/{{maxAlts}}).
login.tooManyAccountsSteps:
To delete and transfer data from your other .fmbot accounts:
1. Use 'Manage alts'
2. Delete .fmbot accounts you don't use anymore
3. Login again
login.altDeleteNote: Note that deleting an .fmbot account does not delete any data from Last.fm.
errors.rateLimited: Sorry, you're being rate-limited. Please cool down and wait a minute before using commands again.
errors.sessionRequired:
While you have set your username, you haven't connected .fmbot to your Last.fm account yet, which is required for the command you're trying to use.
Please reconnect your Last.fm account with the button below.
errors.noScrobbles.header: The Last.fm user **{{user}}** has no listening history on [their profile]({{url}}) yet.
errors.noScrobbles.trackMyMusic: Just created your Last.fm account? Make sure you set it to [track your music app](https://www.last.fm/about/trackmymusic).
errors.noScrobbles.spotify: Using Spotify? You can link that [here](https://www.last.fm/settings/applications). This can take a few minutes to start working.
errors.noScrobbles.disclaimer: Please note that .fmbot is not affiliated with Last.fm or Spotify.
errors.recentScrobblesFailed: Something went wrong while trying to get recent scrobbles.
errors.lastFmFailure: We tried fetching your data from Last.fm, but they returned an error. Please try again in a bit.
errors.lastFmLoginRequired:
We couldn't fetch your data, your recent tracks are marked private on Last.fm.

Change this in your [privacy settings](https://www.last.fm/settings/privacy), or authorize .fmbot to access private scrobbles with {{loginCommand}}.
errors.lastFmBadAuth: We couldn't reach Last.fm for you, your session is invalid or Last.fm is having issues. You can try logging in again with {{loginCommand}} or trying again in a bit.
errors.lastFmSessionExpired: We couldn't fetch your data, .fmbot got disconnected from your Last.fm account. Please re-authorize with {{loginCommand}} and use the 'Connect Last.fm account' button.
errors.lastFmNoResult.artist: Last.fm didn't return an artist for your search.
errors.lastFmNoResult.album: Last.fm didn't return an album for your search.
errors.lastFmNoResult.track: Last.fm didn't return a track for your search.
errors.lastFmNoResult.artistList: Last.fm didn't return an artist list for your search.
errors.lastFmUserNotFound: Last.fm didn't return a result. If you're searching for a user who recently changed their username, they should re-run `/login`.
errors.dmNotSupported: This command is not supported in DMs.
errors.embedLinksRequired: The bot is missing the `Embed Links` permission in this channel, so it can't reply properly. Please grant it server-wide via `Server Settings` > `Roles`, or per-channel via the channel permissions.
errors.indexRequired:
To use .fmbot commands with server-wide statistics, you need to create a memberlist cache first.

Please run `{{refreshCommand}}` to create this.
Note that this can take some time on large servers.
errors.indexOutdated:
Server member cache is out of date, it was last updated over 180 days ago.
Please run `{{refreshCommand}}` to update the cached memberlist.
errors.commandNotEnabledChannel: The command you're trying to execute is not enabled in this channel.
errors.botDisabledChannel: The bot has been disabled in this channel.
errors.commandDisabledServer: The command you're trying to execute has been disabled in this server.
errors.commandDisabledChannel: The command you're trying to execute has been disabled in this channel.
errors.buttonNotForYou: Hey, this button is not for you. At least you tried.
errors.lastFmFailureRate: In the last hour they've returned an error on {{percentage}}% of our requests.  `{{sparkline}}`
artist.notFoundWithValues: Artist `{{artist}}` could not be found, please check your search values and try again.
artist.noLastFmResult: Last.fm did not return a result for **{{artist}}**.
artist.infoFailed: Something went wrong while trying to get artist info.
album.notFoundWithValues: Album `{{album}}` by `{{artist}}` could not be found, please check your search values and try again.
album.notFound:
Album could not be found, please check your search values and try again.

You can also enter the exact value with the | separator. Example: `artist name | album name`.
album.noAlbumOnTrack:
The track you're scrobbling (**{{track}}** by **{{artist}}**) does not have an album associated with it according to Last.fm.
Please note that .fmbot is not associated with Last.fm.
album.noLastFmResult:
Last.fm did not return a result for **{{album}}** by **{{artist}}**.
This usually happens on recently released albums or on albums by smaller artists. Please try again later.

Please note that .fmbot is not associated with Last.fm.
album.infoFailed: Something went wrong while trying to get album info.
track.notFoundWithValues: Track `{{track}}` by `{{artist}}` could not be found, please check your search values and try again.
track.notFound:
Track could not be found, please check your search values and try again.

You can also enter the exact value with the | separator. Example: `artist name | track name`.
track.noLastFmResult:
Last.fm did not return a result for **{{track}}** by **{{artist}}**.

This usually happens on recently released tracks. Please try again later.

judge.intro: Want your music taste to be judged by AI?
judge.usesLeftToday_one: You can use this command `{{count}}` more time today.
judge.usesLeftToday_other: You can use this command `{{count}}` more times today.
judge.supporterPerkModel: ⭐ Supporter perk: Using premium AI model
judge.outOfUses: You've run out of command uses for today.
judge.outOfUsesFree: You've run out of command uses for today, unfortunately the service we use for this is not free.
judge.supporterPromo:
⭐ Become a supporter for better judgements
-# Unlocks a better model and other perks for more insights into your music taste
judge.supporterPromoLimit:
⭐ Become a supporter for better judgements
-# Unlocks an improved model with better output and a higher daily usage limit
judge.apiError: OpenAI API error - please try again
judge.loadingRoastSelf: Loading your roast (don't take it personally)...
judge.noTopResults: Sorry, you or the user you're searching for don't have any top artists or top tracks in the selected time period.
profile.userNotRegistered: That user is not registered in .fmbot.
profile.lastFmError: Could not load this profile due to a Last.fm error, please try again later.
profile.importedPlays: User has most likely imported plays from external source
profile.avgPerArtist: Average of **{{albums}}** albums and **{{tracks}}** tracks per artist
profile.topArtistsPercentage: Top **10** artists make up **{{percentage}}%** of scrobbles
profile.mostActiveDay: Most active day of the week is **{{day}}**
profile.yearsSupporterPromo: *Want to see an overview of your scrobbles throughout the years? [Get .fmbot supporter here.]({{url}})*
profile.yearsSupporterPromoDiscogs: *Want to see an overview of your scrobbles throughout the years and your Discogs collection? [Get .fmbot supporter here.]({{url}})*
profile.noDataStored: *Sorry, it seems like there is no stored data in .fmbot for this user.*
update.nothingNew: Nothing new found on [your Last.fm profile]({{url}}) since the last time we checked {{timestamp}}.
update.spotifyConnectionExpired: Using Spotify? Your connection to Last.fm might have expired, which stops scrobbling completely. Reconnect by pressing **Disconnect** and then **Connect** next to 'Spotify Scrobbling' in [your Last.fm settings](https://www.last.fm/settings/applications).
update.outOfSyncHint: Last.fm not keeping track of your Spotify properly? Try the instructions in `{{command}}` for help.
update.playcountsUpdated: ✅ Cached playcounts have been updated for {{user}} based on {{newScrobbles}}.
update.playcountsUpdatedWithRemoved: ✅ Cached playcounts have been updated for {{user}} based on {{newScrobbles}} and {{removedScrobbles}}.
update.advancedUpdateDisabled: Doing an advanced update is disabled temporarily while Last.fm is having issues. Please try again later.
update.fullUpdateCooldown:
You can't do full updates too often. These are only meant to be used when your Last.fm history has been adjusted.

Using Spotify and having problems with your music not being tracked or it lagging behind? Please use `{{command}}` for help. Spotify sync issues can't be fixed inside of .fmbot.
update.advancedUpdateAlreadyStarted: An advanced update has recently already been started for you. Please wait before starting a new one.
update.cachesBeingRebuilt: The following playcount caches are being rebuilt:
update.supporterFullHistory: *Thanks for being an .fmbot {{userType}}. Your full Last.fm history will now be cached, so this command might take slightly longer...*
update.fullUpdateFailed: Full update could not complete, something went wrong. Please try again later.
update.lastfmUpdateError: ❌ A Last.fm error occurred while attempting to update `{{user}}`:
update.errorUserInfo: - Could not fetch user info from Last.fm
update.importTotal: Combined with your **{{importCount}}** imported plays you have a total of **{{totalCount}}** plays.
update.supporterPromoHistory: Want your full Last.fm history to be stored in the bot? [Get .fmbot supporter]({{url}}).
outofsync.title: ### Using Spotify and tracking is out of sync?
outofsync.intro: .fmbot uses [your Last.fm account]({{url}}) for knowing what you listen to.
outofsync.currentlyPlaying: The last scrobble on your profile is **currently playing**, so it looks like everything is working well.
outofsync.lastScrobble: The last scrobble on your profile was {{timestamp}}, about {{relativeTimestamp}}.
outofsync.notAffiliated: **.fmbot is not affiliated with Last.fm**. Sync and scrobbling issues are Last.fm issues and **not .fmbot issues**, so __we can't fix them for you__.
outofsync.stoppedScrobblingDescription: Spotify expires the Last.fm connection every 6 months. Press **Disconnect** and then **Connect** next to 'Spotify Scrobbling' in [your Last.fm settings](https://www.last.fm/settings/applications).
outofsync.stillNotWorkingDescription: Try restarting your Spotify client. Sometimes there's also other issues with Last.fm or Spotify that can cause this. For a comprehensive list of all solutions, please check **[the guide on the Last.fm support forums](https://support.last.fm/t/spotify-has-stopped-scrobbling-what-can-i-do/3184)**.
outofsync.lastfmIssuesNote:
**Note:**
⚠️ [Last.fm](https://twitter.com/lastfmstatus) is currently experiencing issues, so the steps listed above might not work. .fmbot is not affiliated with Last.fm.
chart.tooManyImages:
You can't create a chart with more than 100 images (10x10).
Please try a smaller size.
chart.notEnoughAlbumsArtist: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) from **[{{artist}}]({{url}})** in {{period}} time period.
chart.tryDifferentArtistFilter: Try a smaller chart, bigger time period ({{periods}}) or remove the artist filter.
chart.notEnoughAlbumsGenre_one: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genre in {{period}} time period.
chart.notEnoughAlbumsGenre_other: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genres in {{period}} time period.
chart.tryDifferentGenres: Try a smaller chart, a bigger time period ({{periods}}) or different genres.
chart.notEnoughAlbums: Not enough scrobbled albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in {{period}} time period.
chart.tryDifferent: Try a smaller chart or a bigger time period ({{periods}}).
chart.extraAlbumsRequired: Note that {{amount}} extra albums are required because you are skipping albums without an image.
chart.notEnoughReleaseYear:
Sorry, you haven't listened to enough albums released in {{year}} ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) to generate a chart.
Please try a smaller chart, a different year or a bigger time period ({{periods}})
chart.notEnoughReleaseDecade:
Sorry, you haven't listened to enough albums released in the {{decade}}s ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) to generate a chart.
Please try a smaller chart, a different year or a bigger time period ({{periods}})
chart.notEnoughNonSingles:
Sorry, not enough non-single albums ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) to generate a chart.
Please try a smaller chart or a bigger time period ({{periods}})
chart.notEnoughArtistsGenre_one:
Not enough scrobbled artists ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genre for a chart this size. 
Please try a smaller chart, a bigger time period ({{periods}}) or different genres.
chart.notEnoughArtistsGenre_other:
Not enough scrobbled artists ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) in the **{{genres}}** genres for a chart this size. 
Please try a smaller chart, a bigger time period ({{periods}}) or different genres.
chart.notEnoughArtists:
User hasn't listened to enough artists ({{amount}} of required {{required}}) for a chart this size. 
Please try a smaller chart or a bigger time period ({{periods}}).
chart.extraArtistsRequired: Note that {{amount}} extra artists are required because you are skipping artists without an image.

jumble.addReactionsPermissionRequired: The bot is missing the `Add Reactions` permission in this channel, which is required for playing Jumble properly. Please grant it server-wide via `Server Settings` > `Roles`, or per-channel via the channel permissions.

shortcuts.supporterPromo: Become an .fmbot supporter and create shortcuts to easily access your favorite commands together with whatever option you configure.
shortcuts.examplesHeader: Some examples of what you can use as input and output:

template.option.track.loved: Indicator if track is loved on Last.fm
template.option.artist.plays: Amount of plays user has on artist

template.option.album.plays: Amount of plays user has on album
template.option.album.plays-week: Playcount on album in last 7 days
template.option.album.plays-month: Playcount on album in last 30 days
template.option.track.plays: Amount of plays user has on track

template.option.track.plays-month: Playcount on track in last 30 days

template.option.previous-track.name: Previous track name

template.option.server.album-listeners: Amount of album listeners in server

crown.functionalityDisabled: Crown functionality has been disabled in this server.
crown.noKnownCrowns:
No known crowns for the artist `{{artist}}`. 
Be the first to claim the crown with `{{command}}`!
crown.noStolenCrowns: You or the user you're searching for don't have any crowns that got stolen yet.
crown.noCrownsYet:
You or the user you're searching for don't have any crowns yet. 

Use `{{command}}` to start getting crowns!

Crowns are rewarded to the #1 listener for an artist with at least {{threshold}} plays.
members.overviewNoResults:
No .fmbot users in this server. 

Use `{{loginCommand}}` to get started, or try `{{refreshCommand}}` to refresh the cached memberlist.
members.overviewPageCounter_one: Page {{page}}/{{pages}} - {{count}} total .fmbot user in this server
members.overviewPageCounter_other: Page {{page}}/{{pages}} - {{count}} total .fmbot users in this server
members.crownsNoResults: No top crown users in this server. Use `{{command}}` to start getting crowns!

members.crownsPageCounter_other: Page {{page}}/{{pages}} - {{count}} total active crowns in this server

members.listeningTimeNoResults:
No .fmbot users in this server, or nobody listened to music recently. 

Maybe try `{{command}}` to refresh the cached memberlist.

members.playsNoResults:
No .fmbot users in this server that we have a total playcount for.

plays.countNotFound: Could not find total count for Last.fm user `{{user}}`.
pace.noPlaysInPeriod: {{mention}} No plays found in the {{period}} time period.
pace.estimateSelf: {{mention}} My estimate is that you will reach **{{goal}}** scrobbles on **{{date}}**.
pace.estimateOther: {{mention}} My estimate is that the user '{{user}}' will reach **{{goal}}** scrobbles on **{{date}}**.
pace.basedOnAlltimeSelf: -# *Based on your alltime average of {{avg}} scrobbles per day — {{total}} total in {{days}} days*
pace.basedOnAlltimeOther: -# *Based on their alltime average of {{avg}} scrobbles per day — {{total}} total in {{days}} days*

pace.basedOnPeriodOther: -# *Based on their average of {{avg}} scrobbles per day in the last {{days}} days — {{total}} total*
streak.onlySavedAbove: Only streaks with {{threshold}} plays or higher are saved.
streak.noActiveStreakHint:
No active streak found.
Try scrobbling multiple of the same artist, album, track or genre in a row to get started.
streak.noSavedStreaks: No saved streaks found for this user.
streak.noSavedStreaksSelf: No saved streaks found for you.
streak.editModeHint: Editmode enabled - Use the trash button to delete streaks
streak.deleteNotFound: Could not find streak to delete.
track.love.error: Something went wrong while adding loved track.
track.love.unloveError: Something went wrong while unloving track.
track.loved.noneYet:
The Last.fm user `{{user}}` has no loved tracks yet! 
Use `{{command}}` to add tracks to your list.
track.scrobble.helpDescription: Scrobbles a track on Last.fm. You can search for a track, enter the exact name with separators, scrobble from a Discogs link, or scrobble along with another user.
track.scrobble.cooldown: Please wait before scrobbling to Last.fm again.
track.scrobble.gwkWarning: Note that users who add fake scrobbles or scrobble from multiple sources at the same time might be subject to removal from Global WhoKnows.
track.scrobble.error: Something went wrong while scrobbling track.
featured.startingUp: .fmbot is still starting up, please try again in a bit..
featured.congratsSelf: 🥳 Congratulations, it's you! You'll be featured until {{time}}.
featured.congratsUser: 🥳 Congratulations! This user is in this server as **{{user}}**.
featured.log.serverFeaturedSelf_one: You have been server featured once
featured.log.serverFeaturedSelf_other: You have been server featured {{count}} times
featured.log.serverFeaturedOther_one: They have been server featured once
featured.log.serverFeaturedOther_other: They have been server featured {{count}} times
featured.log.featuredCountSelf_one: You have only been featured once. Every hour, that is a chance of 1 in {{odds}}!
featured.log.featuredCountOther_one: They have only been featured once. Every hour, that is a chance of 1 in {{odds}}!
featured.log.supporterOdds: As a thank you for supporting, you have better odds every first Sunday of the month.
featured.log.supporterSundayIn_one: Every first Sunday of the month is Supporter Sunday (in {{count}} day). Check '{{command}}' for info.
featured.log.supporterSundayIn_other: Every first Sunday of the month is Supporter Sunday (in {{count}} days). Check '{{command}}' for info.
featured.log.emptyGlobal: Sorry, nobody has been featured yet.. that is quite strange now that I'm thinking about it 🤨🤨
featured.log.emptyServer: Sorry, nobody in this server has been featured yet..
featured.log.emptyFriends: Sorry, none of your friends have been featured yet..
featured.log.emptyGuildFeatured: This server doesn't have any custom featureds yet..
featured.log.guildFeaturedExplainer: Server featured is a premium server feature where the bot regularly features someone from this server. Server admins can configure it with `{{command}}`.
featured.log.emptyGuildUserSelf: Sorry, you haven't been server featured yet..
featured.log.emptyGuildUserOther: Sorry, they haven't been server featured yet..
featured.log.rotates_one: This server's featured rotates every hour, and every rotation is a chance to get picked. Check back later!
featured.log.rotates_other: This server's featured rotates every {{count}} hours, and every rotation is a chance to get picked. Check back later!
featured.log.emptyUserSelf: Sorry, you haven't been featured yet... {{emote}}
featured.log.emptyUserOther: Hmm, they haven't been featured yet... {{emote}}
featured.log.dontGiveUpSelf: But don't give up hope just yet!
featured.log.dontGiveUpOther: But don't let them give up hope just yet!
featured.log.hourlyChanceSelf: Every hour there is a 1 in {{odds}} chance that you might be picked.
featured.log.hourlyChanceOther: Every hour there is a 1 in {{odds}} chance that they might be picked.
featured.log.joinServerPing: Join [our server](https://discord.gg/6y3jJjtDqK) to get pinged if you get featured.
featured.log.supporterSundayThanks_one: Also, as a thank you for being a supporter you have a higher chance of becoming featured every first Sunday of the month on Supporter Sunday. The next one is in {{count}} day.
featured.log.supporterSundayThanks_other: Also, as a thank you for being a supporter you have a higher chance of becoming featured every first Sunday of the month on Supporter Sunday. The next one is in {{count}} days.
featured.log.becomeSupporter_one: Become an [.fmbot supporter]({{url}}) and get a higher chance every Supporter Sunday. The next Supporter Sunday is in {{count}} day (first Sunday of each month).
featured.log.becomeSupporter_other: Become an [.fmbot supporter]({{url}}) and get a higher chance every Supporter Sunday. The next Supporter Sunday is in {{count}} days (first Sunday of each month).
